'''ngangate''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Adverbs|adverb]] meaning "[[Wikt:yawnily|yawnily]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| ng-ng-w
|-
! Word class
| [[Adverb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:yawnily|yawnily]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| ngangate
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[positive]].[[present]] || [[word:ngangate|ngangate]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[mythic]] || [[word:ngangatesher|ngangatesher]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:ngangatesherĂ«m|ngangatesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:ngangatero|ngangatero]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:ngangateshĂ«|ngangateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:ngangateshĂ«m|ngangateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokingangatero|gokingangatero]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokingangateshĂ«|gokingangateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokingangateshĂ«m|gokingangateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gongangankerom|gongangankerom]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gongangankeshĂ«|gongangankeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gongangankeshĂ«m|gongangankeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gongangankeya|gongangankeya]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:ngangaterom|ngangaterom]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:ngangatemu|ngangatemu]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:ngangateya|ngangateya]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokingangaterom|gokingangaterom]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokingangatemu|gokingangatemu]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokingangateya|gokingangateya]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[present]] || [[word:ngangangate|ngangangate]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[mythic]] || [[word:ngangangatesher|ngangangatesher]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:ngangangatesherĂ«m|ngangangatesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:ngangangatero|ngangangatero]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:ngangangateshĂ«|ngangangateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:ngangangateshĂ«m|ngangangateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokingangangatero|gokingangangatero]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokingangangateshĂ«|gokingangangateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokingangangateshĂ«m|gokingangangateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gongangangankerom|gongangangankerom]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gongangangankeshĂ«|gongangangankeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gongangangankeshĂ«m|gongangangankeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gongangangankeya|gongangangankeya]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:ngangangaterom|ngangangaterom]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:ngangangatemu|ngangangatemu]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:ngangangateya|ngangangateya]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokingangangaterom|gokingangangaterom]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokingangangatemu|gokingangangatemu]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokingangangateya|gokingangangateya]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[present]] || [[word:ngĂŠngĂŠte|ngĂŠngĂŠte]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[mythic]] || [[word:ngĂŠngĂŠtesher|ngĂŠngĂŠtesher]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:ngĂŠngĂŠtesherĂ«m|ngĂŠngĂŠtesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:ngĂŠngĂŠtero|ngĂŠngĂŠtero]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:ngĂŠngĂŠteshĂ«|ngĂŠngĂŠteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:ngĂŠngĂŠteshĂ«m|ngĂŠngĂŠteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokingĂŠngĂŠtero|gokingĂŠngĂŠtero]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokingĂŠngĂŠteshĂ«|gokingĂŠngĂŠteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokingĂŠngĂŠteshĂ«m|gokingĂŠngĂŠteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gongĂŠngĂŠnkerom|gongĂŠngĂŠnkerom]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gongĂŠngĂŠnkeshĂ«|gongĂŠngĂŠnkeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gongĂŠngĂŠnkeshĂ«m|gongĂŠngĂŠnkeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gongĂŠngĂŠnkeya|gongĂŠngĂŠnkeya]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:ngĂŠngĂŠterom|ngĂŠngĂŠterom]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:ngĂŠngĂŠtemu|ngĂŠngĂŠtemu]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:ngĂŠngĂŠteya|ngĂŠngĂŠteya]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokingĂŠngĂŠterom|gokingĂŠngĂŠterom]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokingĂŠngĂŠtemu|gokingĂŠngĂŠtemu]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokingĂŠngĂŠteya|gokingĂŠngĂŠteya]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[present]] || [[word:ngafngafte|ngafngafte]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[mythic]] || [[word:ngafngaftesher|ngafngaftesher]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:ngafngaftesherĂ«m|ngafngaftesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:ngafngaftero|ngafngaftero]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:ngafngafteshĂ«|ngafngafteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:ngafngafteshĂ«m|ngafngafteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokingafngaftero|gokingafngaftero]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokingafngafteshĂ«|gokingafngafteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokingafngafteshĂ«m|gokingafngafteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gongafngafnkerom|gongafngafnkerom]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gongafngafnkeshĂ«|gongafngafnkeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gongafngafnkeshĂ«m|gongafngafnkeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gongafngafnkeya|gongafngafnkeya]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:ngafngafterom|ngafngafterom]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:ngafngaftemu|ngafngaftemu]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:ngafngafteya|ngafngafteya]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokingafngafterom|gokingafngafterom]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokingafngaftemu|gokingafngaftemu]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokingafngafteya|gokingafngafteya]]
|}

''76 forms generated.''

== See also ==
